notes: v1.7.2 — HORIZONTAL CHIP/TAB STRIP SCROLL LOCK (iOS scroll-chaining fix, CSS-only). The deployment-detail sub-tab strip (#ops-tab-strip, styled by .subtab-strip — the DEPLOY/SOPS/BOM/MANIFEST/PORTMAP row) and other thin horizontal chip/tab scrollers bounced vertically / scroll-chained during diagonal thumb-swipes on iOS. FIX: one CSS pattern — `touch-action: pan-x; overscroll-behavior-x: contain;` — applied via a single grouped-selector rule to every thin one-row horizontal chip/tab strip that lacked it. touch-action:pan-x makes a diagonal swipe scroll the strip sideways (the vertical component falls through to page scroll) with zero vertical wobble; overscroll-behavior-x:contain stops horizontal overscroll from chaining to the page or firing the iOS back-swipe. AUDIT METHOD: multi-modal workflow (3 independent search angles) + a definitive ground-truth grep of every `overflow-x` (14 total) and `overflow` shorthand (0) container. SCOPE — the 9 chip/tab strips fixed: .subtab-strip (#ops-tab-strip), .sop-filter-row (KNOW/SOP filter pills), .rm-rack-select (rack map filter chips), .rl-filters + .rl-recent-row (rack list chips), .mf-switcher (manifest tab switcher), .hwm-model-row + .hwm-cat-row (HW matrix filter rows), .deploy-rack-nav (rack navigation strip). DELIBERATELY EXCLUDED: the tall content scrollers .cli + .step-cmd (code blocks) and #pdu-h100/#pdu-h200/#pdu-gb300 (PDU diagrams) — touch-action:pan-x there would TRAP vertical page-scroll through them; they are not chip strips and not the reported bug. NOT NEEDED (verified): optic chips (.os-chips), SOP category pills (.sop-category-row), and scope-picker cab chips (mscope groups) all use flex-wrap:wrap — they wrap, don't horizontally scroll, so no bounce; .qa-strip/.rm-toolbar have no overflow-x at all. No JS/markup/data changes — one new CSS rule only. block-0 braces 2565 -> 2566 (+1, the single grouped rule), balanced. node --check 2/2 + sw.js OK, JSON valid, three stamps v1.7.2. Built in Claude Code on 7525c5d (v1.7.1) per the one-builder rule; web-Claude parity review pending (sync brief: PHANTOM-SYNC-v1.6.96-to-v1.7.1.md, +this cut). VERIFY on-device: diagonal thumb-swipe on each of the 9 strips scrolls horizontally with zero vertical wobble; a vertical swipe that lands on a strip still scrolls the page; tall code blocks + PDU diagrams still scroll both ways.
